title: stellaria longipes subsp. longipes
intro: Stellaria longipes subsp. longipes, also known as long-stalked starwort, is a perennial plant species in the Caryophyllaceae family, characterized by its white, star-shaped flowers and hairy stems. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Stellaria longipes subsp. longipes have been found to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
